name: AdaSurvMamba: Dynamic Fusion and Semantic Scanning for Multimodal Survival Analysis

description: arXiv:2607.16260v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal survival analysis utilizing whole slide images (WSIs) and genomic profiles is fundamental for cancer prognosis. Recently, state-space models like Mamba have emerged as powerful tools for sequence modeling. However, translating this success to complex multimodal tasks is hindered by two critical limitations. First, conventional fusion...
author: Jialong Zhong, Tingwei Liu, Baokun Yue, Jingjing Li, Yongri Piao, Miao Zhang, Leiye Liu, Jiahong Jiang, Wei Ji, Huchuan Lu
